Canada

Qatar

# Team News: Canada vs. Qatar injury, suspension list, predicted XIs | World Cup 2026

By Joel Lefevre| 17 Jun 2026 23:00

© Iconsport / Cal Sport Media / Alamy

Days after collecting their first ever points in a World Cup, Canada and Qatar will face each other for the second time in their history as matchday two of World Cup 2026 Group B action concludes at BC Place Stadium on Thursday.

These teams both came back from 1-0 deficits to earn 1-1 draws in their first outings, as we sit in a four-way tie in the group after one match and here Sports Mole rounds up all the latest team news for the two sides.

---

## Canada vs. Qatar

https://www.sportsmole.co.uk/football/canada/world-cup-2026/team-news/GAME%20PAGE%20URL%20HERE

## Canada

Out: None

Doubtful: Alphonso Davies (hamstring), Moise Bombito (tibia)

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Crepeau; Johnston, De Fougerolles, Cornelius, Laryea; Buchanan, Eustaquio, Kone, Millar; J. David, Larin

## Qatar

Out: None

Doubtful: None

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Abunada; Al-Oui, Migue

# Canada vs Qatar: Team News and Predicted Lineups Will Alphonso Davies Return? - Last Word On Football

Author: Steen Kirby
Published: 2026-06-18T06:15:05-04:00
Source: lastwordonsports.com (lastwordonsports.com)
Language: en

## Story

Canada vs Qatar: Team News and Predicted Lineups Will Alphonso Davies Return? - Last Word On Football https://lastwordonsports.com/cdn-cgi/content?id=VP.oQwk_qL_u0uTsrFKilu_AwdCgvoVCtax8d.gfbbM-1781781243.4499192-1.2.1.1-XUhoZe9L1s495lifcWk0XEsayq8himv5REw_zs4VuHA

## Sports. Honestly. Since 2011

June 18, 2026 By Steen Kirby CanMNT, Featured, International Football, Starting Line-ups, World Cup

Team Canada secured a valuable point against Bosnia on matchday 1. That result has Canada second in Group B behind Switzerland, but all teams are on 1 point each and there’s everything to play for when Canada hosts Qatar in Vancouver on Thursday. We take a look at the predicted lineups and team news.

Read More: 2026 World Cup Matchday 8 Predictions Including Mexico vs South Korea

## Canada vs Qatar

Date: Thursday, June 18th, 2026 Venue: BC Place, Vancouver Kick Off: 18:00 local time in Vancouver Referee: Cristian Marcelo Garay Reyes Current Odds: Canada

news_items.title: Canada vs. Qatar projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup 2026 Group B game at BC Place | Sporting News

Canada vs. Qatar projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup 2026 Group B game at BC Place | Sporting News

Continue Without Login

Featured

Sports

# Canada vs. Qatar projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup 2026 Group B game at BC Place

Kyle Bonn

•

Getty Images

Add The Sporting News on Google

JUMP TO:

- Canada projected starting 11
- Qatar projected starting 11
- Canada and Qatar World Cup rosters
- Canada vs. Qatar odds, prediction
- How to watch Canada vs. Qatar

---

After securing their first-ever World Cup point to begin their 2026 FIFA World Cup slate, co-hosts Canada now press on in the pursuit of a knockout stage place as they meet 2022 hosts Qatar on Thursday in Vancouver.

Les Rouges got an equalizing goal from Cyle Larin off the bench in a 1-1 draw with Bosnia & Herzegovina to open the tournament, the first time Canada have ever avoided defeat in a World Cup match on their seventh attempt.

That, along with Qatar's surprising 1-1 draw with Switzerland, has left Group B wide open through the opening round of matches,

news_items.text:
# Canada predicted lineup vs Qatar for FIFA World Cup 2026

Published: 2026-06-18T15:34:29+05:30
Source: khelnow.com (khelnow.com)
Language: en

## Story

Canada predicted lineup vs Qatar for FIFA World Cup 2026

FIFA World Cup

# Canada predicted lineup vs Qatar for FIFA World Cup 2026

By Ayushman Sharma

Follow

Set As Preferred Source

A football enthusiast blending fandom, experience, and love for the game.

Published at :June 18, 2026 at 3:34 PM

Modified at :June 18, 2026 at 3:34 PM

(Courtesy : Getty Images)

## Canada eye a win against Qatar after a draw in their FIFA World Cup 2026 opener.

Canada will be aiming to claim their first-ever FIFA World Cup victory when they host Qatar in a crucial Group B clash at BC Place on Thursday. After opening their campaign with a 1-1 draw against Bosnia and Herzegovina, Jesse Marsch’s side know that three points could significantly boost their hopes of reaching the knockout rounds.

Qatar, meanwhile, are also searching for their maiden World Cup win after sharing the spoils with Switzerland in their opening fixture. With both teams locked on one point, the encounter has all the ingredients of a must-win contest. History slightly favou

news_items.title: Canada vs Qatar FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com US
news_items.author: James Freemantle
news_items.text:
# Canada vs Qatar FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com US

Author: James Freemantle
Published: 2026-06-15T11:13:46.212000+00:00
Source: goal.com (goal.com)
Language: en

## Story

Canada vs Qatar FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com US

WATCH SECURELY FROM ANYWHERE

Jun 15, 2026 04:13-07:00

TV Guide & Streaming

Comprehensive match preview of Canada vs Qatar at World Cup 2026. We talk tactics, team news and more.

World Cup - Grp. B

BC Place Vancouver

Canada vs Qatar will kick off on 18 Jun 2026 at 18:00 EST and 22:00 GMT.

## Canada vs Qatar: Match context

Co-hosts Canada, ranked 30th in the world by FIFA, opened their campaign with a 1-1 draw against Bosnia. Meanwhile, Qatar claimed a dramatic 1-1 draw against Switzerland with a 94th-minute equaliser. Group B could potentially be one of the most tightly contested at the World Cup.

Getty Images

## Who are Canada's coach and key players?

Canada coach Jesse Marsch, formerly with Leeds United, will lean heavily on the quality and experience of Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies, who recently returned from a long injury layoff in their Champions League semi-fina

# Team News: Canada vs. Qatar injury, suspension list, predicted XIs | World Cup 2026

By Joel Lefevre| 17 Jun 2026 23:00

© Iconsport / Cal Sport Media / Alamy

Days after collecting their first ever points in a World Cup, Canada and Qatar will face each other for the second time in their history as matchday two of World Cup 2026 Group B action concludes at BC Place Stadium on Thursday.

These teams both came back from 1-0 deficits to earn 1-1 draws in their first outings, as we sit in a four-way tie in the group after one match and here Sports Mole rounds up all the latest team news for the two sides.

---

## Canada vs. Qatar

https://www.sportsmole.co.uk/football/canada/world-cup-2026/team-news/GAME%20PAGE%20URL%20HERE

## Canada

Out: None

Doubtful: Alphonso Davies (hamstring), Moise Bombito (tibia)

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Crepeau; Johnston, De Fougerolles, Cornelius, Laryea; Buchanan, Eustaquio, Kone, Millar; J. David, Larin

## Qatar

Out: None

Doubtful: None

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Abunada; Al-Oui, Migue"}

After securing their first-ever World Cup point to begin their 2026 FIFA World Cup slate, co-hosts Canada now press on in the pursuit of a knockout stage place as they meet 2022 hosts Qatar on Thursday in Vancouver.

Les Rouges got an equalizing goal from Cyle Larin off the bench in a 1-1 draw with Bosnia & Herzegovina to open the tournament, the first time Canada have ever avoided defeat in a World Cup match on their seventh attempt.

That, along with Qatar's surprising 1-1 draw with Switzerland, has left Group B wide open through the opening round of matches,"}

# Canada predicted lineup vs Qatar for FIFA World Cup 2026

By Ayushman Sharma

Published at :June 18, 2026 at 3:34 PM

Modified at :June 18, 2026 at 3:34 PM

## Canada eye a win against Qatar after a draw in their FIFA World Cup 2026 opener.

Canada will be aiming to claim their first-ever FIFA World Cup victory when they host Qatar in a crucial Group B clash at BC Place on Thursday. After opening their campaign with a 1-1 draw against Bosnia and Herzegovina, Jesse Marsch’s side know that three points could significantly boost their hopes of reaching the knockout rounds.

Qatar, meanwhile, are also searching for their maiden World Cup win after sharing the spoils with Switzerland in their opening fixture. With both teams locked on one point, the encounter has all the ingredients of a must-win contest. History slightly favou"}

Canada vs Qatar will kick off on 18 Jun 2026 at 18:00 EST and 22:00 GMT.

## Canada vs Qatar: Match context

Co-hosts Canada, ranked 30th in the world by FIFA, opened their campaign with a 1-1 draw against Bosnia. Meanwhile, Qatar claimed a dramatic 1-1 draw against Switzerland with a 94th-minute equaliser. Group B could potentially be one of the most tightly contested at the World Cup.

Getty Images

## Who are Canada's coach and key players?
